title: The Ends of All the Earth Shall Hear

verses.text: For his the kingdom, his of right, he rules the nations by his might; All earth to him her homage brings, The Lord of lords, the King of kings. All earth to him her homage brings, the Lord of lords, the King of kings.

Both rich and poor, both bond and free, shall worship him on bended knee, and children's children shall proclaim the glorious honor of his name. All earth to him her homage brings, the Lord of lords, the King of kings.

The Lord's unfailing righteousness all generations shall confess, from age to age shall men be taught what wondrous works the Lord has wrought. All earth to him her homage brings, the Lord of lords, the King of kings.
